_note: All point values are sourced from the official IRCC CRS criteria grid. Values marked TODO:VERIFY must be confirmed against the source URL above. The job offer field is included for UI purposes but awards 0 points effective March 25, 2025 (IRCC policy change).

coreHumanCapital._note: Section A: Core/human capital factors. Two tables: withSpouse (when spouse/CL partner is coming to Canada) and withoutSpouse.

age._note: Points for age. withSpouse table has lower maximums. Key: age as string (exact year). 17-or-under and 45-plus are boundary keys.

education._note: 8 education tiers. Keys 0–7 correspond to EducationLevel enum. Tier 0 = less than secondary.

_enumMapping.2: One-year post-secondary program certificate or diploma
_enumMapping.3: Two-year post-secondary program certificate or diploma
_enumMapping.4: Bachelor's degree OR three or more year post-secondary program
_enumMapping.5: Two or more certificates, diplomas, or degrees — one must be for a program of three or more years
_enumMapping.6: Master's degree, OR professional degree needed to practice in a licensed profession

firstOfficialLanguage._note: Points per CLB level, per ability (speaking/listening/reading/writing). Each ability scored separately. withoutSpouse and withSpouse tables. CLB 1-3 = 0 pts, CLB 4 starts scoring.
firstOfficialLanguage._clbRange: CLB 1-12. Values below CLB 4 award 0 points. CLB 10+ treated as CLB 10 for point calculation.

secondOfficialLanguage._note: Points per CLB level per ability for second official language. Lower points than first language. CLB 5+ threshold to begin scoring. Max 24 pts total (6 per ability × 4 abilities). TODO:VERIFY exact per-ability values against source.
secondOfficialLanguage._todoVerify: TODO:VERIFY — confirm per-ability points for second language CLB 5–9 against canada.ca grid

canadianWorkExperience._note: Years of skilled Canadian work experience. 5+ years treated as 5.

spouseFactors._note: Section B: Spouse or common-law partner factors. Only applicable when spouse is coming to Canada. Max 40 points.

firstOfficialLanguage._note: Per ability, per CLB. Max 20 points (5 per ability × 4 abilities). CLB 1–4 = 0.

skillTransferability._note: Section C: Skill transferability factors. Maximum 100 points total across all combinations. Five official combinations.

educationLanguage._note: Education × First official language proficiency (CLB). Requires minimum education level AND minimum CLB across all 4 abilities.
educationLanguage._todoVerify: TODO:VERIFY — confirm point values for educationLanguage brackets against canada.ca

educationCanadianExperience._todoVerify: TODO:VERIFY — confirm values against canada.ca grid

foreignExpLanguage._note: Foreign work experience × First official language CLB.
foreignExpLanguage._todoVerify: TODO:VERIFY — confirm values against canada.ca grid

foreignExpCanadianExp._note: Foreign work experience × Canadian work experience.
foreignExpCanadianExp._todoVerify: TODO:VERIFY — confirm values against canada.ca grid

certificateLanguage._note: Certificate of qualification (trades) × First official language CLB.
certificateLanguage._todoVerify: TODO:VERIFY — confirm values against canada.ca grid

additionalPoints._note: Section D: Additional points. Includes provincial nomination, French, Canadian education, sibling, and job offer (0 pts post March 2025).

frenchLanguage._note: NCLC 7+ in all 4 French abilities required. Two tiers based on English ability. Effective since 2023 French-stream expansion.
frenchLanguage._todoVerify: TODO:VERIFY — confirm NCLC 7 threshold and both point tiers (25 and 50) against canada.ca

siblingInCanada._note: Sibling who is a Canadian citizen or permanent resident.

jobOffer._note: IMPORTANT: Arranged employment / job offer was removed from CRS effective March 25, 2025 (IRCC policy change). This field is kept in the UI with an explanatory note but ALWAYS awards 0 points. Do NOT change this value.
